reviews.review_title: Spookey Monkes Is Fun and relaxing!
reviews.review_description: Spooky monkes is honestly one of my favorite games on VR. The first reason being is because I know the owner very well. The next reason is because i’m a big fan of horror games, and the fact that shop even has a basketball hoop makes it even more fun! So spooky monkes is 5 stars!
This is a very good game it is underrated and not that many people play it, it has good moderation and a good community, and the owner did a very good job on the desine.
Its got lots to do and its just fun with friends
